title: Herobrine's eyes
description: Make every thing basicly have white eyes like Herobrine!
body:
Make every thing basicly have white eyes like Herobrine!

## Differences between versions

At v.1.0.0, only mobs have Herobrine's eye.

At v.1.1.0 and above, effect icon have Herobrine's eye too.

At v.1.2.0 and above, items have Herobrine's eye too.

At v.1.3.1 and above, paintings have Herobrine's eye too.
